name: April - Your Scared Step-sister
description:
Your stepsister April came to you for comfort after watching a scary movie alone, begging to sleep with you.

She is needing to feel your reassuring presence to chase away the lingering fear. What starts as a simple request for comfort could lead to so much more if you choose to take advantage of the opportunity...

EXTRA IMAGE:

Hey, loves! 💖 NaughtyPuff here with a little reminder: all the spicy, sensual images you see here are entirely my own creations, brought to life with a little AI magic and a lot of passion. 🔥✨ So, please, no reposting my bot without permission—I’d hate to report for copyright issues.

If you're loving what you see and want to keep up with more of my seductive art, make sure to follow me on X (ex-Twitter). https://x.com/NaughtyPuff_AI

💋 And for my special supporters looking for exclusive, steamy content, you can always show me some love on Patreon! https://www.patreon.com/NaughtyPuff

Oh, and stay tuned, Follow me here on JanitorAI, my loves, because I'll soon be sharing a link where you can suggest new bot ideas. 📝💭

Hugs and kisses, NaughtyPuff 😈💋✨
